name: Blob Pictionary Reveal
description: Reveal the polished version of whatever the blobs were trying to depict! Capture your Pictionary arrangement, then this workflow generates the 'what it was supposed to look like' reveal image.

secret_prompt.label: What were the blobs depicting?
secret_prompt.placeholder: e.g. a snowman, a rocket, a cat

params.prompt: This is a blob Pictionary attempt. What shapes and arrangement do you see? How well does it suggest '{{params.secret_prompt}}'? Rate the accuracy 1-5.
{{params.reveal_style}} of {{params.secret_prompt}}. Bold, clear, iconic composition. The definitive depiction of this subject. Vivid colors, clean background, immediately recognizable.
Abstract {{params.reveal_style}} of {{params.secret_prompt}} made entirely of soft squishy gelatinous blob shapes, organic rounded forms in vibrant colors. The blob art interpretation.

A blob Pictionary player tried to draw '{{params.secret_prompt}}' using soft-body blob physics. The judge's analysis: {{blob_analysis.description}}. Write a funny, encouraging 2-sentence verdict on their attempt. Include a score out of 10.
